results.title: Phase 1 - Tasks 01 to 03 Implementation
results.content: Completed initialization with uv, Pydantic configuration, and SQLAlchemy models for User, Skill, Session, Workflow, Repository, History, Error, Document, Rule, Feedback. Set up pytest tests.

results.title: Phase 9-17 CLI Commands Implemented
results.content: h/runNote/runDo - project utilities). All commands registered in main.go. go build + go vet both pass clean. STATE.md format: frontmatter fields + ## Decisions/Blockers/Backlog/PRs sections. XML plan format: <plan id name phase><objective><files><tasks><task type name><action><verify><done>. Wave-based execution groups plans by dependencies. Pattern: loadState()/saveState() for all STATE.md mutations.

results.title: coder CLI — state.go + cmd_new_project.go + cmd_map_codebase.go (Phases 9 & 10)
results.content: Implemented three new files for the coder CLI (cmd/coder/). state.go: shared ProjectState struct (project, current_phase, step, decisions, blockers, backlog, PRs map), RoadmapPhase, coderPath(), loadState(), saveState(), loadRoadmap(), phaseDir(), ensurePhaseDir(), projectExists(). All .coder/ paths route through coderPath(). cmd_new_project.go: runNewProject() — flags: --auto, --prd, --resume. Guards against re-init via projectExists(). Interactive deep Q&A via ChatStream loop (bufio.Scanner, blank×2 or 'done' to exit). Generates REQUIREMENTS.md then ROADMAP.md via streaming LLM, with [Y/n/edit] approval gates. Writes PROJECT.md + REQUIREMENTS.md + ROADMAP.md + STATE.md (phase=1, step=discuss). Uses getChatClient(cfg) pattern. cmd_map_codebase.go: runMapCodebase() — flag: --refresh, positional area arg. Four sequential ChatStream focus passes (tech→STACK.md, arch→ARCHITECTURE.md, quality→CONVENTIONS.md, concerns→CONCERNS.md) written to .coder/codebase/.

results.title: WhatsApp setup guide 6-step i18n rollout
results.content: Rebuilt StepConfigureChannel to use new guideStep keys matching 6-step template with case split and verify+save webhook instruction; added guideStep keys in en/vi/id/ja/zh locales; validated with yarn lint (next lint + tsc).

results.title: Refactor config loading to config.go in truyentt
results.content: Centralized environment loading in config/config.go with Configuration struct containing Server and MySQL sections. Added LoadConfigFromEnv, env parsing helpers, and server port normalization. Simplified config/mysql.go to only connection creation. Updated main.go to load unified config and run Gin using appConfig.Server.Port. Verified with go fmt and go test ./....
